title: Developing a Personalized Product Recommendation Agent
scenario: Create a conversational agent that can provide personalized product recommendations to customers based on their purchase history and preferences. The agent should be able to understand user input and generate relevant product suggestions. Ensure the agent's responses are concise and within a 50-word limit.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the conversational agent provide personalized product recommendations based on user input?
Does the conversational agent understand user input and generate relevant product suggestions?
Does the prompt adhere to the constraint of being under 50 words?
